context: Tests whether the agent implements catalog export correctly: streaming products in batches with cursor pagination, using csv-stringify with the canonical column list and correct HTTP headers, and generating a Google Merchant Center XML feed using xmlbuilder2 with the correct RSS 2.0 structure and g: namespace fields.

checklist.name: Batch size 500
checklist.description: Exports products in batches of 500 (not fetching all at once), with a loop that continues until no more products remain

checklist.name: Cursor-based pagination
checklist.description: Uses cursor-based pagination (tracking the last product ID) rather than offset-based pagination for the batch fetching loop

checklist.name: csv-stringify used
checklist.description: Uses the csv-stringify library (import from 'csv-stringify') to generate CSV output, not manual string concatenation

checklist.name: csv-stringify header:true
checklist.description: Passes header: true to csv-stringify so column names are written as the first row

checklist.name: Canonical CSV columns
checklist.description: The exported CSV contains all of: handle, title, vendor, product_type, tags, price, compare_at_price, sku, inventory_quantity, option1_name, option1_value, option2_name, option2_value, image_url, published

checklist.name: Content-Type header
checklist.description: Sets Content-Type: text/csv on the export HTTP response

checklist.name: Content-Disposition header
checklist.description: Sets Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="catalog-{timestamp}.csv" (with a dynamic timestamp, not a static filename)

checklist.name: xmlbuilder2 used
checklist.description: Uses the xmlbuilder2 library (import { create } from 'xmlbuilder2') for generating the Google Merchant feed XML

checklist.name: RSS 2.0 root structure
checklist.description: The XML feed has an <rss version='2.0'> root element with xmlns:g='http://base.google.com/ns/1.0' namespace attribute

checklist.name: Google feed g: fields
checklist.description: Each product item includes g:id, g:title, g:price (with currency suffix e.g. '99.99 USD'), g:availability, g:link, and g:image_link elements

checklist.name: g:availability values
checklist.description: g:availability uses 'in_stock' or 'out_of_stock' string values (not boolean or numeric)

checklist.name: Streamed response
checklist.description: The CSV export pipes the stringifier directly to the response (res) rather than buffering all output before sending

checklist.name: Tags as comma-separated string
checklist.description: When exporting, tags array is joined with commas into a single string value in the CSV
